payload.summary: Wave 5 (F1) verified: 773 pass / 0 fail asserted directly, tsc clean. prd frontmatter field (path-hardened, validate warns item.prd-missing), --prd/--clear-prd flags, status shows prd. Four canonical docs reviewed: prd-new (hard stop at human approval gate), prd-parse (refuses non-done plan item, ADR-0013), epic-decompose (session-sized children, DAG discipline), task-lifecycle (claim rule leads; done is human-only). ccpm counterparts intact for F9.
